channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: The Exposure Queue Is Starting to Look Like the Threat Surface
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: Why recurring KEV additions, emergency patch deadlines, and ransomware exploitation of overlooked infrastructure all point to one board-level issue: the exposure queue is now part of the attack surface.

item.title: The Exposure Backlog Is Becoming the Real Breach Surface
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: Why newly exploited flaws, long-tail remediation, and password-driven identity attacks all point to the same board-level issue: exposure backlog is now a primary risk surface.

item.title: Patch Volume Is Becoming a Business-Speed Problem
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: Why patch volume, exploited collaboration software, and crypto theft all point to the same board-level issue: response capacity is becoming the bottleneck.

item.title: The Half-Life of Exposure Is Shrinking
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: Why the ActiveMQ exploitation story is really about collapsing exposure windows and the business cost of slow asset visibility.

item.title: The Executive Is the New Perimeter
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: Why SharePoint exploitation and executive-targeted social engineering now belong in the same board-level conversation.
